use_cases: AI chatbot text input with model selection dropdown for switching between GPT, Claude, and Gemini models
Multi-model AI platform interface for selecting preferred language model
Conversational AI input component for SaaS applications with model switching capability
Text submission with icon attachments for AI-powered applications
Real-time chat input interface for AI assistant platforms
ai_summary: A composite AI chat input component built with shadcn/ui featuring a model selector dropdown for switching between popular LLM providers (GPT, Claude, Gemini), a textarea for text input, and action buttons for sending messages. Uses standard flat styling with Lucide icons and Card container for clean, functional AI chatbot interfaces in SaaS and dev-tool applications.
